findings: The fixture provides readable Corvid founding texture with ordinary containment routine before rupture.
Some proper nouns remain frontloaded, but the revised opening supplies enough role and leverage context for play.
State consequences become visible mainly at folds and endings; acceptable for draft branch-and-fold, but future fixtures should surface state more often during mid-scene play.
The green-interface-wing-tagged juvenile now has stronger visual and physical grounding before the rupture beat.

Clarified hatch 3C state and final proof wording after spatial review.
Kept the fixture in draft/reference status rather than training-ready status.
